sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Paul Oldham Sells Shares of Advanced Energy Indust
feed.summary: Advanced Energy Industries Inc's (AEIS) Executive Vice President and CFO, Paul Oldham, sold 4,314 shares of the company on March 18, 2026. Following this transaction, Oldham now owns 22,217 shares. The stock is currently trading at $315.99, making its price-to-GF-Value ratio 2.54, indicating it is significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus.

feed.title: ZVOL ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns CBOE:ZVOL
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Volatility Premium Plus ETF (ZVOL), detailing its key statistics, investment strategy, and performance. ZVOL aims to offer a monthly income stream and inverse exposure to mid-term VIX futures, primarily as a short-term trading tool rather than a long-term investment. The ETF is structured as a commodity pool, avoids issuing K-1 forms, and pays monthly dividends, with its shares issued by Volatility Shares LLC.

feed.title: Alvotech (ALVO) TTM Profitability Challenged By Q4 US$108.5 Million Net Loss
feed.summary: Alvotech (ALVO) reported a Q4 net loss of US$108.5 million but maintained trailing twelve-month profitability at US$27.9 million. The article discusses the tension between recent quarterly losses and full-year profit, highlighting investor focus on margin sustainability and earnings stability. Valuation metrics appear attractive, yet balance sheet concerns and reliance on fluctuating revenue streams pose risks, prompting caution for investors.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) CEO sells shares to cover RSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare CEO John E. Kao sold 73,046 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. This sale was explicitly stated to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) and was not a discretionary trade. Following this transaction, Kao retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: Jif releases 'simple' peanut butter spread made with just 3 ingredients
feed.summary: Jif has launched a new "Simply Creamy Unsweetened" peanut butter, featuring just three ingredients: peanuts, salt, and palm oil. This move aims to cater to consumers seeking cleaner labels while maintaining the brand's signature smooth texture and nutty taste. The product is currently available at Walmart and will soon be rolled out to other national retailers.

feed.title: A Look At MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) Valuation Following Recent Share Price Softness
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) operates an electronic bond trading platform with annual revenue of US$846.3m and net income of US$246.6m. Despite recent share price softness, with returns of 3.76% over 7 days and 1.74% over 1 month, its 1-year total shareholder return is 18.5% and 5-year is 62.82%. The company is considered undervalued by one narrative, trading at an estimated 17% discount to its intrinsic value and below some analyst targets, with growth driven by expansion into emerging markets and Eurobonds.

feed.title: Primega Group Holdings Limited (PGHL) Stock Forecast & Price Prediction 2026–2030
feed.summary: This article provides a stock forecast and price prediction for Primega Group Holdings Limited (PGHL) from 2026 to 2030, with detailed monthly price estimates up to 2057 and beyond. It indicates a neutral current sentiment with some bullish technical indicators and forecasts PGHL to reach $0.9312 by the end of 2026 and $1.99 by the end of 2030, representing significant gains from its current price of $0.8100. The article also includes disclaimers that the information is not investment advice.

feed.title: Arcellx (ACLX) CFO gifts 5,000 shares to family foundation
feed.summary: Arcellx, Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer, Michelle Gilson, gifted 5,000 shares of common stock to a family charitable foundation on March 17, 2026. This transaction was a bona fide gift for no consideration. Despite the transfer, Ms. Gilson retains voting and investment power over the shares through her role as President of the foundation, maintaining her overall economic exposure.

feed.title: ETFs to Tap on NVIDIA's 10-for-1 Stock Split Retail Frenzy
feed.summary: NVIDIA's upcoming 10-for-1 stock split aims to make its shares more accessible to a wider range of investors and increase liquidity. This move, coupled with the company's continuous advancements in AI chip technology and bullish analyst sentiment, is expected to further boost its growth. The article suggests several ETFs with significant NVIDIA allocation for investors looking to capitalize on this opportune moment.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Director Sells 6,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy Director Steven West sold 6,000 shares of the company's stock for over $1.13 million, reducing his position by 57.23%. This insider selling occurred despite the company increasing its quarterly dividend and maintaining a "Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price near $195.43. The sale follows Diamondback Energy missing consensus estimates for its latest quarterly earnings and revenue.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: This article analyzes Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) stock after recent share price weakness, suggesting it may be overvalued. Using an Excess Returns model, Simply Wall St estimates an intrinsic value of $132.86 per share against a current price of US$158.50, indicating it's 19.3% overvalued. Similarly, its current P/E of 27.15x is significantly higher than Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 16.49x, reinforcing the overvalued assessment for the financial infrastructure company.

feed.title: Akso Health Group (AHG) Valuation Check As Shares Hit A New 52 Week High On Strong Revenue Growth
feed.summary: Akso Health Group (AHG) recently reached a new 52-week high of US$2.10, showing significant revenue growth of 75.6% and a 30% total return over the past year. Despite these gains, the company trades at a high price-to-book ratio of 10.5x, which is considered expensive given its thin 1% gross margin and substantial loss of US$135.67m against US$14.84m in revenue. This valuation suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to the broader US Healthcare industry and its peers.

feed.title: CoStar CEO Andy Florance named Business Journal Real Estate Icon
feed.summary: Andy Florance, CEO of CoStar Group Inc., has been recognized as a Business Journal Real Estate Icon by the Washington Business Journal. Florance founded CoStar in 1986 while still in college, later expanding its portfolio with major platforms like Apartments.com and Homes.com. The article briefly highlights his entrepreneurial journey and the significant growth of his real estate technology company.

feed.title: QuickBooks Desktop Deadline Tests Intuit Retention As Xero Targets Migrations
feed.summary: Intuit faces a retention challenge as its QuickBooks Desktop 2023 support ends on May 31, 2026, forcing small businesses to migrate. Competitors like Xero and Xendoo are actively targeting these migrating users with a dedicated platform, Q2X, increasing churn risk for Intuit. The transition tests Intuit's ability to move its customer base to its cloud-based offerings, while also presenting an opportunity for more consistent, subscription-based revenue.

feed.title: Martin Franklin Sells 3,000,000 Shares of APi Group (NYSE:APG) Stock
feed.summary: Martin Franklin, a director at APi Group, sold 3,000,000 shares of the company's stock for approximately $122.64 million, reducing his stake by 12.38%. This transaction follows APi Group's strong Q4 earnings, which surpassed expectations with Q4 EPS of $0.44 and revenue of $2.12 billion, leading to positive analyst sentiment and raised price targets. Institutional investors hold a significant 86.62% of the company's stock, which currently has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts.

feed.title: Assessing Hartford (HIG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Undervaluation Debate
feed.summary: Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) has experienced a recent share price pullback, with a 1-day decline of 1% and a month-long decline of 8%, contrasting with a 1-year return of 12%. Despite this short-term weakness, the stock is seen by many analysts as 12.9% undervalued, with a narrative fair value of $150.85 against its current trading price of $131.36. Investors are urged to consider potential risks like elevated catastrophe losses and softer property and casualty pricing.

feed.title: 3 Best Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy in March
feed.summary: This article recommends three "Dividend Kings" – Coca-Cola, Procter & Gamble, and Federal Realty – as solid dividend growth stocks for investors to consider in March, especially during uncertain market conditions. These companies are highlighted for their reliable products, strong brand loyalty, and consistent dividend increases spanning over 50 years. Federal Realty, as the only REIT Dividend King, is noted for its high yield and quality retail properties.

feed.title: Aeva (NYSE: AEVA) CTO Mina Rezk gifts 900,000 company shares, retains large stake
feed.summary: Aeva Technologies, Inc.'s CTO and director, Mina Rezk, reported a bona fide gift of 900,000 shares of Aeva common stock. The transfer was made indirectly through a trust, with no payment received, and is considered a non-market transaction for personal estate planning. Following this gift, Rezk still holds a substantial stake, with 2,056,669 shares held indirectly and 1,469,760 shares held directly.

feed.title: VisionWave Holdings acquires VisionWave Israel, appoints new CEO and signs consulting deal
feed.summary: VisionWave Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:VWAV) has acquired 100% of VisionWave IL Ltd. for nominal consideration, despite VWAV shares trading down 33% over the past six months and being deemed overvalued by InvestingPro. Following the acquisition, VisionWave IL Ltd. appointed Khdoura Sabbagh as CEO with an annual salary of $150,000 and eligibility for 2,000,000 stock options, and also entered into a consulting agreement with CO-Finance Financial and Accounting Consulting Ltd. for financial services. This move is part of VisionWave's broader strategic developments, including recent acquisitions and increased stakes in other Israeli companies.

feed.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Increases Despite Market Slip: Here's What You Need to Know
feed.summary: Quanta Services (PWR) saw its stock increase by 1.04% in a recent trading session, outperforming the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq, which all experienced losses. Over the last month, PWR shares have risen by 10.15%, significantly exceeding the Construction sector's decline. Analysts predict robust growth for the company's upcoming earnings, with an estimated EPS increase of 20.22% and revenue growth of 14.08% compared to the previous year.

feed.title: Is Jack Henry And Associates (JKHY) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) has experienced recent share price weakness but shows longer-term gains. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is fairly valued around $164 per share according to an Excess Returns model, indicating it's slightly below its intrinsic value of $175.89. However, when evaluated using its P/E ratio of 23.4x against a proprietary Fair Ratio of 13.5x, the stock appears overvalued.

feed.title: Exclusive Travel Deals for Canadians: Unbeatable Offers from Travelzoo
feed.summary: Travelzoo has released new exclusive vacation packages for its Canadian members, featuring discounted trips to destinations like Aruba, Cape Breton, and Tofino. These curated deals offer premium travel experiences at reduced prices, appealing to those seeking tropical getaways or scenic Canadian escapes. Membership provides access to these limited-time offers, including flights, accommodations, and tax-inclusive packages, alongside personalized recommendations.

feed.title: Silver Lake adjusts Dell (NYSE: DELL) position, still holds 50.2M shares
feed.summary: Silver Lake-affiliated funds have filed an amendment to their Schedule 13D, disclosing an updated beneficial ownership of 50,240,830 Dell Technologies' Class C shares, representing about 7.8% of total outstanding common stock and 14.0% of the combined voting power as of March 18, 2026. Over the past 60 days, Silver Lake entities sold approximately 1.35 million Class C shares and made non-cash distributions of another 496,202 Class C shares to equity holders, obtained through the conversion of Class B shares. This activity is viewed as a repositioning and distribution of an existing large stake rather than a new strategic move, with Dell's multi-class voting structure retaining 10 votes per Class A and B share, and one vote per Class C share.

feed.title: Certain Pre-Funded Warrants of Vision Marine Technologies Inc. are subject to a Lock-Up Agreement Ending on 20-MAR-2026.
feed.summary: Vision Marine Technologies Inc. announced that certain pre-funded warrants are subject to a lock-up agreement ending on March 20, 2026. These warrants will be locked up for 91 days, starting from December 19, 2025. Executive officers and directors have agreed not to transfer common shares or convertible securities for this period without prior written consent.

feed.title: Linking wells to facilities: How digital tools are reshaping oil and gas production
feed.summary: Digital tools are transforming the oil and gas industry by connecting wells, facilities, and pipelines to improve operational efficiency and decision-making. Solutions like SLB's OptiFlow, OptiSite, and the Tela AI assistant integrate data and workflows across the entire production system, providing earlier insights and enabling more coordinated management. This shift allows operators to move from monitoring individual assets to managing entire systems holistically, leading to more informed decisions and optimized production.

feed.title: Tigo Energy Adopts New Executive Incentive and Bonus Plan
feed.summary: Tigo Energy has approved a new Executive Short Term Incentive Plan for 2026, linking executive cash bonuses to revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and individual performance goals. The company's board also granted one-time cash bonuses to CEO Zvi Alon ($200,000) and CFO Bill Roeschlein ($150,000) for their 2025 achievements, including the early prepayment of debt and asset sales. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates TYGO as Neutral, noting improving financial performance tempered by valuation limitations and execution risks.

feed.title: PSU vesting and tax withholding for Tigo Energy (NASDAQ: TYGO) officer
feed.summary: Tigo Energy's Chief Growth Officer, Tian Jing, recently had 35,057 performance stock units (PSUs) vest into shares of common stock, following the company's achievement of revenue and adjusted EBITDA targets for 2025. To cover tax obligations related to this vesting, 18,574 shares were withheld at a price of $4.14 per share. After these transactions, Tian Jing directly holds 289,212 shares, which includes previously granted Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) that will vest in installments.

feed.title: Richard Gaynor Acquires 1,731 Shares of Zai Lab (NASDAQ:ZLAB) Stock
feed.summary: Director Richard Gaynor recently purchased 1,731 shares of Zai Lab (NASDAQ:ZLAB) stock for approximately $32,733, increasing his total holdings to 56,630 shares valued at about $1.07 million. Despite missing EPS estimates in Q4, Zai Lab exceeded revenue expectations, though it remains unprofitable with a negative net margin. Analyst sentiment for ZLAB is mixed, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $50.

feed.title: Director Bao Minfei lists 36 UTime (WTO) ordinary shares
feed.summary: UTime Ltd director Bao Minfei has filed an initial insider ownership statement, declaring direct holdings of 36 ordinary shares. This Form 3 filing establishes his current share position as a company insider and does not report any recent purchases or sales. The statement indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding this disclosure.

feed.title: NiSource declares $0.30 dividend
feed.summary: NiSource has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share. This financial action was recently announced by the company.

feed.title: IT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) for alleged securities fraud, inviting investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to participate. The lawsuit claims Gartner made false and misleading statements regarding its seasonality risk, growth potential in contract value, and the improvement of business with "tariff impacted companies," despite continued declines in CV growth. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm by May 18, 2026, to discuss their rights and potentially lead the lawsuit.

feed.title: Mid-America Apartment Communities declares $1.53 dividend
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) has announced a dividend of $1.53 per share for its shareholders. This declaration signifies the company's commitment to returning value to investors through regular distributions. Investors will likely be interested in the ex-dividend date and payout date for this distribution.

feed.title: Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma Pipeline Grows as 45+ Pharma Companies Advance Novel Skin Cancer Therapies, Finds DelveInsight | Incyte, Shanghai Henlius Biotech, Novartis, Rakuten Medical, Roche, G
feed.summary: The Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma (CSCC) pipeline is expanding with over 45 pharmaceutical companies, including Incyte, Shanghai Henlius Biotech, Novartis, and Rakuten Medical, developing novel therapies. DelveInsight's report highlights several promising drug candidates such as HLX07, Opzelura (ruxolitinib cream), and RM-1995, across various clinical stages. This growth addresses the unmet need for targeted treatments for CSCC, a prevalent non-melanoma skin cancer often linked to UV radiation-induced mutations.

feed.title: CDW SEC Filings - CDW Corp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to CDW Corporation's SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, alongside insider trading activity. Stock Titan offers AI-powered summaries of these documents to help investors quickly understand financial results, governance changes, and material events. Recent filings detail insider transactions, quarterly earnings, dividend announcements, and leadership transitions within the company.

feed.title: Wallbox (NYSE: WBX) CFO discloses initial share and stock option holdings
feed.summary: Wallbox N.V. CFO Maria Isabel Lopez Trujillo has filed an initial ownership report, detailing her equity stake in the company. The filing indicates she holds 1,882 vested Class A Ordinary Shares in the form of restricted stock units and a fully vested option to purchase 169 Class A Ordinary Shares at an exercise price of €0.042 per share ($0.049). This Form 3 report serves as an initial disclosure of her beneficial ownership rather than a record of recent transactions.

feed.title: CSX Corporation adopts remote control locomotives to enhance rail yard safety
feed.summary: CSX Corporation has implemented remote control locomotives for rail yard operations, operated by Federal Railroad Administration-certified employees, to enhance safety and efficiency. These locomotives feature integrated safety measures that automatically halt movements if safety criteria are not met. This initiative aligns with CSX's broader strategy of using technology, including a dedicated drone fleet and leadership changes to strengthen intermodal tech, to improve rail safety and operational efficiency.

feed.title: Blackstone entities sell $26.2 million in Bumble (BMBL) shares
feed.summary: Entities associated with Blackstone recently sold over 7.3 million shares of Bumble Inc. (NASDAQ:BMBL) for approximately $26.2 million. Despite this sale, Blackstone entities still retain a significant stake in Bumble. The transaction occurred as Bumble shares traded at $3.74, a considerable drop over the past six months, although the company recently reported Q4 2025 revenues and adjusted EBITDA that surpassed Wall Street expectations.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) CFO records stock grant and tax share withholdings
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems' Sr. VP & CFO, John M. Wall, reported receiving a grant of 15,616 shares of common stock as restricted stock units on March 16, 2026. Simultaneously, 24,684 shares were withheld on March 16 and 17 at approximately $293 per share to cover tax obligations from vesting performance-based and time-based stock awards. Following these transactions, Wall directly holds 60,959 shares of Cadence common stock.

feed.title: Cadence Design (NASDAQ: CDNS) SVP awarded 8,366 RSUs in equity grant
feed.summary: Marc Taxay, Cadence Design Systems Inc.'s SVP & General Counsel, was awarded 8,366 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 16, 2026, as part of his executive compensation. This transaction, classified as a grant with no purchase price, increases his direct holdings to 18,965 shares of Cadence common stock. The details were disclosed in an SEC Form 4 filing, indicating a neutral impact on the company.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Employees Arrested for Alleged Sales to China
feed.summary: Three individuals associated with Super Micro Computer, including a senior vice president, have been indicted for allegedly conspiring to illegally sell AI-powered servers to China. Super Micro placed two employees on leave and fired a contractor after learning of the scheme to divert U.S.-assembled computer servers in violation of export-control laws. The indictment claims billions of dollars worth of servers were involved, with one individual remaining a fugitive.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Employees Arrested for Allegged Sales to China
feed.summary: Three individuals associated with Super Micro Computer, including a senior vice president, a sales manager, and a contractor, have been indicted for allegedly conspiring to sell AI-powered servers to China in violation of export-control laws. Super Micro Computer placed two employees on leave and fired one contractor after learning of their alleged involvement. The indictment claims the servers, containing AI technology, were ordered through a Southeast Asian company, repackaged, and then shipped to China.

feed.title: Franklin Martin E sells APi Group shares for $122.64 million
feed.summary: Franklin Martin E, a ten percent owner and director of APi Group Corp (NYSE:APG), sold 3,000,000 shares for $122.64 million at $40.88 per share. This transaction occurred after APG shares gained 64% over the past year, with the company also exceeding Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations. RBC Capital has raised its price target for APi Group to $53, maintaining an Outperform rating due to a strong backlog and favorable market demand.

feed.title: APG (NYSE: APG) Form 144: Insider plans sale of 3,000,000 shares
feed.summary: APi Group Corp. (APG) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 3,000,000 shares of its Common Stock through J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, valued at $123,570,000. These shares represent approximately 0.7% of the company's 431,456,087 outstanding shares as of March 19, 2026, and originate from indirect acquisitions in 2019 and a stock dividend in 2017. A Form 144 signals an intent to sell but does not confirm the actual execution of the sale.

feed.title: WVVI (WVVI) CEO receives 15,000-share unrestricted stock award
feed.summary: Willamette Valley Vineyards CEO Michael Jordan Osborn received a 15,000-share unrestricted common stock award as part of the company's 2025 Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan. This grant, with a reported price of $0.00 per share, increased his direct holdings to 20,000 shares. The award was compensation and not an open-market purchase, and additional shares were acquired subsequently in 2025.
